templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: A standard mutual NDA for sharing confidential information between two parties, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: The cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to capture the business-specific terms (parties, dates, governing law) that are incorporated by reference into the standard terms.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: A standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering subscription terms, order forms, and standard legal protections.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Defines service uptime and performance commitments. Designed to complement the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA).

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Covers data processing obligations under privacy regulations such as GDPR, for use when a vendor processes personal data on behalf of a customer.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Used for early-stage partnerships where a vendor and customer collaborate during product development, governing feedback, IP ownership, and confidentiality.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Governs the delivery of professional services including consulting, implementation, and custom development work, with support for statements of work.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Establishes the terms of a business partnership, covering roles, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and termination conditions.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Required under HIPAA when a vendor handles protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity, defining permitted uses and safeguards.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Governs the licensing of on-premise or downloadable software to end users, including license scope, restrictions, and support terms.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: A short-term trial agreement allowing prospective customers to evaluate a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: An addendum covering AI-specific contractual terms — including data use, model training restrictions, and liability — to be used alongside a primary software agreement.
